summary: Iteration 26: Testing new features - User Last Active display, Document Folder Move, and Drag & Drop confirmations. All 12 backend tests and 13 frontend tests passed successfully.
seed_data_creation: None - all tests use dynamic test data with automatic cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three features verified working: (1) User Management now shows 'Zuletzt online' column with relative time formatting (vor X Min., vor X Std., Gerade eben, Nie) and green pulsing indicator for online users (active in last 5 minutes). The last_active field is updated on login and /me endpoint calls. (2) Document folders can be moved via new PUT /api/document-folders/{id}/move endpoint with circular reference prevention. (3) Drag & Drop operations show confirmation dialogs before executing moves in both Documents and Articles pages.

user_last_active_column.details: Zuletzt online column visible in user management table with relative time display

user_online_indicator.details: Green pulsing indicator (bg-emerald-500 animate-pulse) shows for users active in last 5 minutes

user_last_active_api.details: last_active field included in /api/users response and updated by login/me endpoints

folder_move_endpoint.details: PUT /api/document-folders/{id}/move endpoint moves folders to target or root

folder_circular_reference_prevention.details: Attempting to move parent into child returns 400 with appropriate error message

documents_drag_drop_structure.details: Documents page has folder tree with grip handles for drag & drop

articles_move_option.details: Articles have 'Verschieben' option in dropdown menu with category tree dialog

articles_drag_handles.details: Article cards show GripVertical drag handles for editors/admins
